source: HUD FY2026 Multifamily Tax Subsidy Project (MTSP) Income Limits
note: Numbers are LOOKUP values, not computed. Do NOT derive 60% as 1.2x50% in general code - HUD applies rounding/exceptions; store both official rows. Matches the starter-pack MTSP table for Boston-Cambridge-Quincy, MA-NH HMFA, effective 2026-05-01.
